mapper.select: select id, tenant_id as tenantId, supplier_id as supplierId, scm_supplier_code as scmSupplierCode, remark, del_flag as delFlag, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from spd_scm_supplier_bind where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and supplier_id = #{supplierId} and (del_flag is null or del_flag = '' or del_flag = '0') limit 1

select b.id, b.tenant_id as tenantId, b.supplier_id as supplierId, b.scm_supplier_code as scmSupplierCode, b.remark, b.del_flag as delFlag, b.create_by as createBy, b.create_time as createTime, b.update_by as updateBy, b.update_time as updateTime, fs.name as supplierName from spd_scm_supplier_bind b left join fd_supplier fs on fs.id = cast(nullif(trim(b.supplier_id), '') as unsigned) and fs.tenant_id = b.tenant_id and (fs.del_flag = 0 or fs.del_flag is null) where b.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag = '' or b.del_flag = '0') order by b.supplier_id

select scm_supplier_code from spd_scm_supplier_bind where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and supplier_id = #{supplierId} and (del_flag is null or del_flag = '' or del_flag = '0') and scm_supplier_code is not null and trim(scm_supplier_code) != '' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into spd_scm_supplier_bind(id, tenant_id, supplier_id, scm_supplier_code, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time) values(#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{supplierId}, #{scmSupplierCode}, #{remark}, '0', #{createBy}, now())
mapper.update: update spd_scm_supplier_bind set scm_supplier_code = #{scmSupplierCode}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and supplier_id = #{supplierId} and (del_flag is null or del_flag = '' or del_flag = '0')
